tool.name: comprehensive_js_analysis
tool.description: Perform comprehensive JavaScript analysis: fetch JS files, extract endpoints, detect secrets, identify frameworks, and extract parameters.

parameter.name: max_files
parameter.description: Maximum external JS files to fetch.

parameter.name: include_secrets
parameter.description: Scan for secrets (may expose sensitive data).

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Timeout per HTTP request in seconds.

returns.description: Comprehensive results: js_files_found, endpoints, parameters, auth_patterns, frameworks, routes, secrets, and high_severity_secrets.
